title: SCOTUS ruling may upend Jan. 6 charges, including Trump | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: After a disastrous debate performance, President Joe Biden remains defiant, saying he has no plans to end his reelection campaign.

title: Michigan governor rejects calls to 'Draft Gretch' to replace Biden
shortDescription: Michigan's governor dismisses calls to replace Biden on the Democratic ticket for president.

title: Trump aide Steve Bannon reports to federal prison
shortDescription: Steve Bannon was convicted in 2022 of defying a subpoena from the House Jan. 6 committee. He will serve fourth months in prison.

title: SCOTUS rules Trump has some presidential immunity
shortDescription: Although presidents have some immunity, the Supreme Court ruled against former president Donald Trump's "absolute immunity" claims.

title: Which newspapers are calling for Biden to drop out of the 2024 race?
shortDescription: Five major U.S. news outlets' editorial boards calling on Biden to end his reelection campaign following debate performance.

title: Supreme Court kicks GOP social media cases back to lower courts
shortDescription: The Florida and Texas state laws were passed in 2021 over concerns that conservative views were being suppressed on Facebook, Twitter and YouTube.

title: In historic ruling, Supreme Court grants Trump significant presidential immunity
shortDescription: In their biggest case of the year, the Supreme Court decided for the first time when presidents can be criminally prosecuted.

title: Can Joe Biden survive his poor debate performance? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: How Black voters view the candidates. | Hurricane Beryl intensifies into a Category 4 storm. | Could this be the summer of jellyfish?

title: Trump Golf must prove eligibility for liquor license, NJ AG says
shortDescription: The New Jersey AG's office reviewed Trump Golf liquor license eligibility for compliance after his hush money conviction. The ABC will hold a hearing.

title: Debate damages Biden's core support, exclusive poll finds
shortDescription: A large number of Democrats say Joe Biden should be replaced as the party's presidential nominee in an exclusive USA TODAY/Suffolk University poll.

title: Trump aide Steve Bannon reports to prison for defying Jan. 6 subpoena
shortDescription: Former Trump aide Steve Bannon reported to prison for his 4-month sentence for defying a House subpoena about the Capitol attack Jan. 6.

title: Daily Briefing: Biden says no go
shortDescription: The president buckles down on his reelection bid and more news to know on Monday.

title: Trump appeals to certain Black voters. Will it be enough?
shortDescription: Some Black voters aren't bothered any more by Trump's record than by the economy under Biden.

title: Supreme Court Trump immunity ruling is here. Don't expect a trial soon
shortDescription: Whatever the Supreme Court decides about whether Donald Trump is immune from prosecution, it is likely too late to try him before the election.

title: Far right surges in French elections as second round looms
shortDescription: President Emmanuel Macron's party began talks with leftist and centrist parties to deny the far right National Rally victory in the runoff.

title: Doug Burgum says there was a 'smooth transition' in 2021, even after Capitol riot
shortDescription: Potential Trump VP pick and North Dakota Gov. Doug Burgum said Trump's transition when he left the White House was "smooth," even after being prompted about Jan. 6.

title: More than 70% of voters say Biden doesn't have mental, cognitive health to serve
shortDescription: The president has faced growing calls to step aside in the 2024 race after a poor debate performance last week.

title: John Fetterman says abandoning Joe Biden would hand Donald Trump a 2024 victory
shortDescription: Fetterman compared concerns about Biden's debate performance to his own struggles after suffering a stroke during his 2022 Senate race.

title: Supreme Court's slow pace on Trump immunity case makes trial before election unlikely
shortDescription: Donald Trump's bid for criminal immunity from prosecution for trying to overturn his 2020 election loss is set to be decided on Monday by the U.S. Supreme Court.

title: How Democrats could replace Biden as presidential candidate before November
shortDescription: After President Joe Biden's shaky performance at the debate with former President Donald Trump on Thursday night, some Democrats openly questioned whether he should be replaced as their candidate.

title: Can Joe Biden survive debate fiasco? Even his friends aren't sure.
shortDescription: All the options for Democrats carry risks of chaos and division that could undermine the odds of victory by any nominee in November.

title: Historian who predicted 9 of last 10 elections says Dems shouldn't drop Biden
shortDescription: “Debate performances can be overcome,” Allan Lichtman said. “At the first sign of adversity the spineless Democrats want to throw under the bus, their own incumbent president.”

title: Trump made MAGA happen. JD Vance represents those who will inherit it
shortDescription: One of Trump's top contenders for vice president, Sen. JD Vance of Ohio is a leader of the young GOP grappling for control of the party.

title: A law that transformed life in America turns 60
shortDescription: The 1964 Civil Rights Act outlawed segregation in public places and banned job discrimination.

title: Bob Woodward calls Biden's debate performance 'bad'
shortDescription: Bob Woodward said President Joe Biden’s debate performance was “so bad, so awful” that something must have happened for it to go haywire.

title: Ben Carson said Trump could have phrased 'Black jobs' in a better way
shortDescription: Ben Carson said in a new interview that Donald Trump could have phrased his remarks about “Black jobs” during the first debate in a better way.

title: Kari Lake, Utah senator call for Biden's removal
shortDescription: Trump supporter Kari Lake wants Arizona's U.S. Senate race to hinge on presidential loyalties, but Ruben Gallego has maintained distance from Biden.
